# ThinkMystery

ThinkMystery creates printable scavenger hunts, treasure hunts, mystery games, and escape room activities for kids ages 4–10.

Primary topics:
- Printable scavenger hunts
- Pirate treasure hunts
- Birthday scavenger hunts
- Indoor rainy day activities for kids
- Escape room games for kids
- Detective mystery games
- Screen-free printable activities

Audience:
Parents, teachers, homeschoolers, and party planners.

Products:
Instant-download printable PDF activity kits.

Primary site:
https://thinkmystery.com

Main sections:
https://thinkmystery.com/scavenger-hunts/
https://thinkmystery.com/treasure-hunts/

The site is updated regularly with new printable activity pages and themed scavenger hunt experiences.
